title: Untitled document (1).pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform designed for growing Shopify e-commerce brands.
* Founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India, it combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to increase customer lifetime value (LTV).
* The platform's loyalty programs allow merchants to construct points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* The review management feature automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews via scheduled emails or SMS.
* The software automatically syncs verified reviews with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Businesses can build custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* The platform integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Businesses can create custom referral networks and membership tiers with perks like early access, free shipping, or special discounts.
* The platform provides built-in email marketing flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without requiring custom development work.
